title: Market Brief — Monday, May 18, 2026
summary: Compute is scarce across every GPU class: A100 at 20% available (134/332), H200 at 21% (56/190), B200 at 14% severe shortage (102/191), and H100 at 10% severe shortage (40/183). H100 spot surged 42.9% day-over-day to $2.86/hr, the sharpest single-day move in the stack, with H200 volatility at 121.7% annualized signaling panic bidding for next-gen silicon.
paragraphs: Compute is scarce across every GPU class: A100 at 20% available (134/332), H200 at 21% (56/190), B200 at 14% severe shortage (102/191), and H100 at 10% severe shortage (40/183). H100 spot surged 42.9% day-over-day to $2.86/hr, the sharpest single-day move in the stack, with H200 volatility at 121.7% annualized signaling panic bidding for next-gen silicon.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), Llama 70B on H100 runs $10.45/M tokens, meaning DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.45/M output and Meta Llama 3.3 at $0.40/M are selling at catastrophic losses exceeding $10/M tokens. DeepSeek: Burning Cash. OpenAI premium tiers (o3 Pro at $80/M output): Strong. Anthropic Opus at $25/M: Neutral. Google Gemini 2.5 Flash at $2.50/M: Weak, margin-thin on H100/H200.

B200 is undervalued at $5.00/hr spot with the lowest inference cost ($3.66/M raw, $4.58/M TCO-adjusted) and 39% margin at high-tier pricing, making it the only GPU where mid-market providers survive. OpenAI o3 Pro is overvalued at $80/M output, a 17x markup over B200 TCO that compresses hard once B200 availability climbs past 25%.
bullets: 40 of 183 H100 GPUs available, a 10% severe shortage driving 42.9% daily price spikes.
102 of 191 B200 GPUs available at just 14%, entering severe shortage territory with utilization up 5.6pp in 30 days.
$2.86/hr H100 spot with 60.2% annualized volatility makes short-term inference contracts a losing bet.
21.76 LLMflation index means GPT-4 equivalent output costs 78% less than at March 2023 launch.
$0.06/M output for open-source 8B models is 1,333x cheaper than OpenAI o3 Pro at $80/M.
90.3% H100 utilization, up 10.5 percentage points in 30 days, signals demand is outrunning new supply.
